page-title.purpose: One per screen — page and greeting headers.

body.purpose: Default reading text; prose capped at 65–75ch.

label.purpose: Form labels, button text, secondary metadata.

mono.purpose: Serial numbers, asset codes, MAC addresses, IDs (Geist Mono).

shadows.name: card-lift
shadows.purpose: Resting elevation for cards and inputs — the only at-rest shadow.

shadows.name: device-bezel
shadows.purpose: Showcase tablet bezel only; reads as physical hardware.

motion.name: ease-out-quart
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions; no bounce.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single filled action per screen.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 44px; padding: 0 16px; background: #2563eb; color: #fff; font-family: Geist, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; border: none; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 200ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #1d4ed8; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgb(37 99 235 / 0.4); } .ds-btn-primary:active { background: #1e40af; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 44px; padding: 0 16px; background: #fff; color: #374151; font-family: Geist, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; border: 1px solid #d1d5db; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 200ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #f9fafb; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgb(37 99 235 / 0.4); }

components.name: Verify State Badge
components.description: Status pill; color always paired with a text label.
components.css: .ds-badge-verified { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; padding: 2px 8px; background: #f0fdf4; color: #15803d; border: 1px solid #bbf7d0; border-radius: 9999px; font-family: Geist, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; } .ds-badge-verified::before { content: ""; width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 9999px; background: #16a34a; }

components.name: Discrepancy Badge
components.html: พบความไม่ตรง
components.css: .ds-badge-discrepancy { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; padding: 2px 8px; background: #fef2f2; color: #b91c1c; border: 1px solid #fecaca; border-radius: 9999px; font-family: Geist, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; } .ds-badge-discrepancy::before { content: ""; width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 9999px; background: #dc2626; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard text field; border shifts to Instrument Blue on focus.
components.html: <input class="ds-input" placeholder="ค้นหาด้วยซีเรียล…" />
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; height: 44px; padding: 0 12px; background: #fff; color: #111827; font-family: Geist, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; border: 1px solid #d1d5db; border-radius: 8px; transition: border-color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1), box-shadow 200ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #6b7280; } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #2563eb; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgb(37 99 235 / 0.4); }

components.name: Card
components.description: Content container; flat, separated by a 1px border and a whisper shadow.
components.html:
รายการสินค้า

ค้นหา ตรวจยืนยัน และจัดการสินค้ารายตัว
components.css: .ds-card { background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius: 12px; padding: 24px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.05); font-family: Geist, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-card-title { margin: 0 0 4px; font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 600; color: #111827; } .ds-card-body { margin: 0; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #4b5563; }

components.name: Serial Number (Mono)
components.description: Machine-assigned codes set in Geist Mono so digits align and 0/O, 1/l stay legible.
components.css: .ds-serial { font-family: "Geist Mono", ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, monospace; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #374151; letter-spacing: 0.01em; }

narrative.overview: StockCheck is a precise handheld instrument, not a dashboard to admire. Picture a calibrated tool held in one hand on a stockroom floor: the reading is unambiguous, the controls are exactly where the thumb expects them, and nothing on the face is there for decoration. The system is calm, precise, and trustworthy — quiet by default so the one thing that matters (verified? discrepancy?) is the loudest thing on screen. Color is rationed: a confident Instrument Blue carries action and focus; green and red are reserved strictly for verify state; everything else is cool neutral gray layered tonally for depth. Flat at rest, single tuned sans (Geist) at a fixed rem scale.
keyCharacteristics: Calm density: show what the task needs, nothing more.
One confident accent (Instrument Blue) for action + focus; color otherwise means state.
Flat-by-default; depth via tonal gray layering and 1px borders, not shadows.
Field-first: touch targets ≥44px, glanceable status, full light/dark parity.
Tactile & confident controls — clear hover/active/focus feedback, never flashy.

rules.name: The State-Color Rule
rules.body: Green and red mean exactly one thing each: verified and discrepancy. Forbidden as decoration, emphasis, or category color.

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Instrument Blue covers ≤10% of a screen — one primary button, the active nav item, the focus ring. A second blue button on the same screen means one is wrong.

rules.name: The Fixed-Scale Rule
rules.body: Sizes are fixed rem, never clamp()/fluid. A heading must not shrink in a sidebar or inside the tablet frame.

rules.name: The Mono-for-Machines Rule
rules.body: Anything a machine assigned (S/N, asset tag, MAC, ID) is set in Geist Mono; anything a human wrote is set in Geist Sans.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. To separate two panels, use a border or a tonal step, not a shadow. Shadow is for physical objects (the bezel) and nothing else.

dos: Do keep Instrument Blue (#2563eb) to ≤10% of a screen — one primary action, the active nav item, the focus ring.
Do reserve green/red strictly for verified / discrepancy state, always paired with a text label for color-vision safety.
Do separate panels with 1px borders and tonal gray steps; stay flat (only shadow-sm at rest).
Do keep every touch target ≥44px and every interactive element with visible hover + focus + active states.
Do set serial numbers, asset codes, and IDs in Geist Mono.
Do maintain full light/dark parity and ≥4.5:1 body contrast (≥3:1 large), placeholders included.
donts: Don't drift toward enterprise-bloat (SAP-style): no cramped gray density, deeply nested menus, sub-44px controls, or modal-on-modal.
Don't adopt the generic AI-SaaS template look: no cream/sand body background, no gradient text, no hero-metric block, no identical icon-card grids, no uppercase tracked eyebrow over every section.
Don't use border-left/border-right >1px as a colored accent stripe; use full borders, background tints, or a leading icon.
Don't use glassmorphism as decoration, or shadows to fake separation.
Don't use clamp()/fluid type in product UI, or pair a second font family with Geist.
Don't let body text fall back to Arial — wire --font-geist-sans onto body in globals.css.
Don't convey status by color alone, and never remove focus outlines.
